localized title: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York
plot outline: Kevin McCallister (Macaulay Culkin) is back. But this time he's in New York City with enough cash and credit cards to turn the Big Apple into his own playground. But Kevin won't be alone for long. The notorious Wet Bandits, Harry (Joe Pesci) and Marv (Daniel Stern), still smarting from their last encounter with Kevin, are bound for New York City too, plotting a huge holiday heist. Kevin's ready to welcome them with more battery of booby traps the bumbling bandits will never forget.
title: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York
original title: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York
akas: Mom, I Missed the Plane Again... and I'm Lost in New York (France)

other companies.name: International Alliance of Theatrical Stage Employees (IATSE)
